description: §38.4 clean neg — the same channel synced cell declared in the canonical V5-strict structural form `<count> = 0` (no `@shared`) auto-syncs from body placement and fires NO E-CHANNEL-* diagnostic. The delta from `channel/shared-modifier` is dropping the removed `@shared` marker.
rationale: §38.4: a reactive cell declared inside a channel body with the structural form `<name> = init` auto-syncs by virtue of placement — no modifier is required, so E-CHANNEL-SHARED-MODIFIER does not fire.
